records.stage_evidence: This is a diagnostic report, not a procedural image.

ocr.verbatim:
Department of Radiology & Imaging
FMT/RAD/06
Rev. Dt. : 01/01/2016
NAME : 
PATIENT ID : 010611714
ORDER NO. : 506311
REFERRED BY: 
AGE : 37 Years
SEX : F
DATE : 18-Feb-2026
ABDOMINAL AND PELVIS SONOGRAPHY
B-mode real time USG done.
Liver is normal in size and shape and show normal homogenous echopattern.
No intrahepatic focal or diffuse lesion seen.
Gall bladder is minimally distended with multiple calculi within (8-10) largest
measures 14-15 mm.
C.B.D. and portal vein are of normal calibre.
(Rt) kidney measures 9.0 x 3.7 cm. (Lt) kidney measures 10.9 x 4.4 cm.
Both kidneys show normal cortical echogenicity.
No calculus, hydronephrosis or S.O.L. seen on either side.
Spleen, Pancreas and major abdominal vessels are normal.
No ascites, adenopathy or collection seen. Urinary bladder is normal.
Uterus is normal in size, shape and show normal midline endometrial echo.
Both ovaries are normal. No adnexal mass. No free fluid in P.O.D.
Bowel loops appear normal.
OPINION: GALL BLADDER IS MINIMALLY DISTENDED WITH MULTIPLE CALCULI WITHIN (8-10)
LARGEST MEASURES 14-15 MM.
SUGGESTED : CLINICAL CORRELATION.
Dr.
MBBS, DNB (Radiology)
Reg.
FMF UK Certified
FMF ID 316532
Consultant Radiologist

records.summary: This is a typed ultrasound report of the abdomen and pelvis, detailing findings from a B-mode real-time scan. The report notes a normal liver, kidneys, spleen, pancreas, and bowel. The gall bladder is described as minimally distended with multiple calculi (stones) measuring 14-15 mm, which is the key abnormal finding. The report concludes with a suggestion for clinical correlation.
key_observations: Normal liver, kidneys, spleen, pancreas, and bowel loops.
Gall bladder is minimally distended with multiple calculi (stones) measuring 14-15 mm.
Suggestion for clinical correlation due to gall bladder findings.

records.stage_evidence: Diagnostic ultrasound images; no interventional devices visible

records.summary: Six ultrasound images from a diagnostic abdominal scan showing the kidneys and surrounding structures. The images are labeled 'RIGHT KIDNEY' and 'LEFT KIDNEY' with measurements for depth and distance. The patient is a 37-year-old female.
key_observations: Six ultrasound images from a diagnostic abdominal scan
Images show the right and left kidneys with measurements (IDist: 9.0cm, Dist: 3.7cm for right; IDist: 10.3cm, Dist: 4.4cm for left)
Images are from a Hitachi ultrasound machine (Probe C251)
